    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Metrics.Builder
    Metrics.Builder.addFeature(Feature feature)
    Adds a feature to be configured with the submit executor.
    Metrics.Builder
    Metrics.Builder.addFeatures(Collection<Feature> features)
    Adds a collection of features to be configured with the submit executor.
    Metrics.Builder
    Metrics.Builder.addMetric(Metric<?> metric)
    Adds a metric to be collected and submitted.
    Metrics.Builder
    Metrics.Builder.addMetrics(Collection<Metric<?>> metrics)
    Adds a collection of metrics to be collected and submitted.

    Metrics.builder()
    Instantiates a new Builder.
    Metrics.Builder

    Sets the platform implementation.
    Metrics.Builder
    Metrics.Builder.scheduler(TaskScheduler scheduler)
    Sets the task scheduler.
    Metrics.Builder

    Sets the JSON serializer.
    Metrics.Builder

    Sets the submitter.
